Assembly: The assembly icRhyFore2.1 is based on 41x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, the primary assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. Chromosome X was assigned based on ancestral X BUSCO genes. The centromeric regions are highly repetitive and some of them look not to be complete, so the order and orientation are uncertain, as follows:SUPER_1: from ~56.19-74.95 MbSUPER_2: from ~68.38-74.92Mb,SUPER_3: from ~37.20-46.83Mb,SUPER_4: from ~53.23-59.73Mb,SUPER_5: from ~41.18-43.36Mb,SUPER_6: from ~35.04 to 36.88Mb.
